title: Inbound Private Link for performance-intensive services (Public Preview)
body: Inbound Private Link for performance-intensive services such as Zerobus Ingest and Lakebase Autoscaling is now in Public Preview. See [Configure inbound PrivateLink for performance-intensive services](/aws/en/security/network/front-end/service-direct-privatelink).

ref_links.text: Configure inbound PrivateLink for performance-intensive services
